description.p: Armar Manager is a Kirigami/PySide6 desktop application that manages N modded Arma Reforger dedicated servers across M machines. It speaks HTTP and Server-Sent Events to a small armar-agentd daemon that runs on each managed machine, tunnelled over SSH so no public ports are exposed.
Authentication uses your existing SSH agent; the manager never reaches into the host filesystem. Mods are resolved from Workshop URLs and pinned into a lockfile for reproducible runs.
Initial release with the multi-server instance model, the armar-agentd fleet daemon, and the Kirigami desktop UI shell.
